blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 62°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: light drizzle, highs of 45°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
